title: Aegis Gear
description: Are you tired of always using Netherite? With this mod, you will have more choices for progressing with your gear! All are vanilla friendly and balanced!
body:
THIS MOD IS STILL WORK IN PROGRESS, MORE ITEMS WILL BE ADDED SOON.

 

Are you tired of always using Netherite? With this mod, you will have more choices for progressing with your gear! This mod aims to bring in more alternative sets of gear to give players choices, all of these gear sets are balanced and fit in with the vanilla game!

The mod includes:
Topaz Gear
Rose Gold Gear
Amethyst Gear
Aquamarine Gear
Emerald Gear
Titanium Gear

there will be more to come!
